branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Target & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Twins pride

columnists.name: Lars Knutson
columnists.backstory: A Nordeast Minneapolis reporter who covered the Hrbek-Puckett years and has never once dropped a Hrbek quote without context.
columnists.signature_phrase: Up here, the box don't lie.
columnists.voice_sample: Correa doubled, Ryan pitched into the seventh, and Minnesota beat the White Sox 4-2 at Target Field. Record now 8-9.

columnists.name: Marlene Holmqvist
columnists.backstory: A Saint Paul church organist who believes the Twins' playoff streak-breaker in 2023 was a sign from above and hasn't stopped praying since.
columnists.signature_phrase: Oh, ya sure, this is the year.
columnists.voice_sample: Buxton's knees feel good this week and that's all the forecast I need. Minnesota nice is about to turn into Minnesota nasty, mark it down.

columnists.name: Gunnar 'Gunny' Bjornstad
columnists.backstory: A Duluth retired ironworker who drives down for every homestand and has a losing streak stored up for every rebuild.
columnists.voice_sample: The Pohlads run a bakery and the bread's always stale. Every October they're gone in three games and every April they're telling me it's different. It isn't.
